# AssignableDocument.QuestionBox

**Structure**

A box on a page for a question.

## Declaration

```swift
struct QuestionBox
```

### Creating a question box

- [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument/QuestionBox/init(id:pageID:bounds:)]

### Inspecting the question box

- [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument/QuestionBox/bounds]
- [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument/QuestionBox/ID-swift.typealias]
- [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument/QuestionBox/id-swift.property]
- [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument/QuestionBox/pageID]
- [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument/QuestionBox/Document]

### Comparing question boxes

- ``==(*:*:)`

### Hashing the question box

- [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument/QuestionBox/hash(into:)]

## Operators

- **==(_:_:)**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether two values are equal.

## Initializers

- **init(id:pageID:bounds:)**: Initialize a question box.

## Instance Properties

- **bounds**: The bounds of the question box on the page.
- **id**: The stable identity of this box.
- **pageID**: A read-only property providing the identifier of the page that owns this question box. If the box is not yet assigned to a page, this value is `nil`.

## Instance Methods

- **hash(into:)**: Hashes the essential components of this value by feeding them into the given hasher.

## Type Aliases

- **AssignableDocument.QuestionBox.Document**: The document type this element is for.
- **AssignableDocument.QuestionBox.ID**: A type representing the stable identity of this box.

## Inspecting an assignable document

- **AssignableDocument.ID**: A type representing the stable identity of this document.
- **id**: The stable identity of this document.
- **isMultiPageDocument**: `true`, if this document has more than one page; `false`, otherwise.
- **isPartial**: Denotes whether or not this document is a partial one.
- **AssignableDocument.PartIDs**: An enumeration containing the identities of parts managed by this view.
- **partIDs**: Returns a collection of identifiers reflecting the manifest of parts available in the document.
- **AssignableDocument.Question**: A question in the assignable document.
- **questions**: A collection of questions defined for this assignable.
- **AssignableDocument.Element**: The type for elements of this document. An element is a component of the document such as a page or question.
- **pagesDebugDescription**
- **AssignableDocument.Error**: Errors for this document type.

## Conforms To

- AssignableDocumentElement
- DocumentElement
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Identifiable
